name: gtm-enrichment-deep
description: Deep GTM lead enrichment from an email (+ optional name). Sixtyfour AI agents are the primary source for person + company data, funding, and AI/B2B classification; Apollo is the routed fallback for LinkedIn match and organization funding. All steps are routed MPP via the SELAT Router.

email.description: Lead's email address, e.g. jane@acme.com. The domain is derived from this address.

domain.description: Company domain, e.g. acme.com. Derive from the email if not supplied.

firstName.description: Lead's first name, if known. Improves Sixtyfour match rate.

lastName.description: Lead's last name, if known. Improves Sixtyfour match rate.

company.description: Company name, if known. Improves Sixtyfour match rate.

steps.label: enrich lead — Sixtyfour AI agent (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)

struct.full_name: Full legal name of this person
struct.title: Current job title at their company
struct.linkedin_url: LinkedIn profile URL (full URL starting with https://linkedin.com/in/)
struct.city: City where the person is located
struct.state: State or region where the person is located
struct.country: Country where the person is located

steps.label: enrich company — Sixtyfour AI agent (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)

struct.description: One-paragraph description of what the company does
struct.linkedin_url: LinkedIn company page URL (full URL starting with https://linkedin.com/company/)
struct.founded_year: Year the company was founded (number only)
struct.total_funding_amount_usd: Total funding raised in USD (number only, no $ sign)
struct.latest_funding_date: Date of most recent funding round (YYYY-MM-DD format)
struct.latest_funding_stage: Stage of most recent funding round (e.g., Series A, Series B, Seed)
struct.latest_funding_amount_usd: Amount raised in most recent round in USD (number only)
struct.is_ai_company: true or false - does this company build or primarily use AI/ML technology?
struct.ai_evidence: Brief explanation of why this is or is not an AI company
struct.is_b2b_saas: true or false - is this a B2B SaaS company?
struct.b2b_evidence: Brief explanation of why this is or is not B2B SaaS

steps.label: fallback person match — Apollo (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router) — run only if Sixtyfour returned no LinkedIn URL
fallback org enrich — Apollo (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router) — run only if Sixtyfour returned no funding data
